title: Session status chip
description: Compact HeroUI `Chip` showing a Session's lifecycle status. Variant map: scheduled=neutral, confirmed=info, in_progress=accent, completed=success, cancelled=danger, rescheduled=warning.

variant.$expr: ({ scheduled: 'neutral', confirmed: 'info', in_progress: 'accent', completed: 'success', cancelled: 'danger', rescheduled: 'warning' })[props.status]

children.$expr: ({ scheduled: 'Scheduled', confirmed: 'Confirmed', in_progress: 'In progress', completed: 'Completed', cancelled: 'Cancelled', rescheduled: 'Rescheduled' })[props.status]
